## Topic

The deprecated deployment pipeline using shell scripts and rsync.

## Key Facts

- Replaced by GitHub Actions CI/CD pipeline in April 2026
- Used rsync over SSH to deploy to a single server
- No rollback mechanism — manual recovery only

## Insights

- The simplicity was fine for a single server but broke down with multiple environments
